metadata.description: Lightweight land suitability index for site selection

source_notes.industrial_proxy_points: Derived centroid proxies from 34936 power plant locations (clustered at 0.25° grid). Proxy for industrial/utility zone proximity — not verified zoning data.

metadata.empty_categories_warning: The following categories have zero features, meaning land scoring relies on proxy proximity only: no verified zoning, ownership, or brownfield data.

industrial_proxy_points.c: Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo
